new_claims.claim_text: Iran attacked Kuwait's Ministry of Oil building as retaliation for Trump and Israel coordinating an attack against Iran's energy infrastructure.
US and Israel bombed petrochemical facilities in Iran.
new_claims.notes: Contradicts other claims about Iran's actions, also unverified.

new_claims.claim_text: Trump says Iran has 48 hours to open the Strait of Hormuz or 'all hell will reign down on Iran.'
new_claims.notes: Another unverified geopolitical claim from a sensationalist source.

new_claims.claim_text: Al Jazeera confirms the US and Israel have bombed over 760 schools and 350 health centers in Iran.
new_claims.notes: Extremely high impact claim of war crimes, citing Al Jazeera, unverified in broader context.

new_claims.claim_text: Trump has been taken to Walter Reed Hospital.
new_claims.notes: Explicitly labeled 'UNCONFIRMED' but spread by a notable account.

new_claims.claim_text: Video of automated sheep shearing is made with AI.
new_claims.notes: Commenter claims AI-generated, raising questions about media authenticity.
